content: Self-Refine’s iterative no-supervision output refinement framework can be repurposed as a modular backbone to unify scattered multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning discrete perspective-based feedback into an ongoing self-improvement loop. This unification retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data while addressing the limitation of most existing self-reflection mechanisms that only leverage one-off inconsistent perspectives rather than iteratively building on them.
